barbeque.name: Barbeque
barbeque.description: The cooked meat of a defeated critter.It has a delightful smoky aftertaste.
barbeque.summary: Barbeque is made from Meat prepared at an Electric Grill.

berry_sludge.name: Berry Sludge
berry_sludge.description: A mashed up Bristle Berry sludge with an exceptionally long shelf life.Its aggressive, overbearing sweetness can leave the tongue feeling temporarily numb.
berry_sludge.summary: Berry Sludge is a food item made from 5 Sleet Wheat Grain (or Megafrond Grain) and 1600 kcal Bristle Berry (or Pikeapple). It has a Food Quality of Good (+3) and provides 4,000 kcal.

bog_jelly.name: Bog Jelly
bog_jelly.description: A fruit with an outer film that contains chewy gelatinous cubes.
bog_jelly.summary: Bog Jelly is one of the early food game sources when starting in the Swampy Biome.

bristle_berry.name: Bristle Berry
bristle_berry.description: A sweet, mostly pleasant-tasting fruit covered in prickly barbs.
bristle_berry.summary: A Bristle Berry is the fruit of the Bristle Blossom plant.

calamari.name: Calamari
calamari.description: Uncooked meat from a very dead Glo Squid.It's a little slippery.

cooked_seafood.name: Cooked Seafood
cooked_seafood.description: A cooked piece of freshly caught aquatic critter.
cooked_seafood.summary: The Cooked Seafood is a food item made from Fish Fillet or Raw Shellfish at the Electric Grill. It provides 1,600 kcal with food quality of .

curried_beans.name: Curried Beans
curried_beans.description: Chewy Nosh Beans simmered with chunks of Tonic Root.
curried_beans.summary: Curried Beans are a food item made at the Gas Range with Tonic Root and Nosh Beans. It provides 5,000 kcal with food quality of and the unique Hot Stuff effect, which grants +3 Athletics, +3 Strength, +1 Sneeziness, and +5% stress for 2 cycles.

dried_berry_pie.name: Dried Berry Pie
dried_berry_pie.description: A dehydrated Mixed Berry Pie ration. It must be rehydrated in order to be considered Food
dried_berry_pie.summary: Dried Berry Pie is a food item made by the Dehydrator from Mixed Berry Pie. It doesn't spoil and is inedible until restored at the Rehydrator.

dried_curried_beans.name: Dried Curried Beans
dried_curried_beans.description: A dehydrated Curried Beans ration. It must be rehydrated in order to be considered Food
dried_curried_beans.summary: Dried Curried Beans is a food item made by the Dehydrator from Curried Beans. It doesn't spoil and is inedible until restored at the Rehydrator.
dried_curried_beans.effects: Hot Stuff: Athletics +3, Strength +3, Sneeziness +1, Stress: +5%/cycle

dried_frost_burger.name: Dried Frost Burger
dried_frost_burger.description: A dehydrated Frost Burger ration. It must be rehydrated in order to be considered Food
dried_frost_burger.summary: Dried Frost Burger is a food item made by the Dehydrator from Frost Burger. It doesn't spoil and is inedible until restored at the Rehydrator.
dried_frost_burger.effects: Soul Food: Athletics -2, Stress: -15%/cycleAquatic Diet: Radiation Resistence: +20 %

dried_mushroom_quiche.name: Dried Mushroom Quiche
dried_mushroom_quiche.description: A dehydrated Mushroom Quiche ration. It must be rehydrated in order to be considered Food
dried_mushroom_quiche.summary: Dried Mushroom Quiche is a food item made by the Dehydrator from Mushroom Quiche. It doesn't spoil and is inedible until restored at the Rehydrator.

dried_mushroom_wrap.name: Dried Mushroom Wrap
dried_mushroom_wrap.description: A dehydrated Mushroom Wrap ration. It must be rehydrated in order to be considered Food
dried_mushroom_wrap.summary: Dried Mushroom Wrap is a food item made by the Dehydrator from Mushroom Wrap. It doesn't spoil and is inedible until restored at the Rehydrator.

dried_pepper_bread.name: Dried Pepper Bread
dried_pepper_bread.description: A dehydrated Pepper Bread ration. It must be rehydrated in order to be considered Food
dried_pepper_bread.summary: Dried Pepper Bread is a food item made by the Dehydrator from Pepper Bread. It doesn't spoil and is inedible until restored at the Rehydrator.

dried_spicy_tofu.name: Dried Spicy Tofu
dried_spicy_tofu.description: A dehydrated Spicy Tofu ration. It must be rehydrated in order to be considered Food
dried_spicy_tofu.summary: Dried Spicy Tofu is a food item made by the Dehydrator from Spicy Tofu. It doesn't spoil and is inedible until restored at the Rehydrator.

dried_stuffed_berry.name: Dried Stuffed Berry
dried_stuffed_berry.description: A dehydrated Stuffed Berry ration. It must be rehydrated in order to be considered food
dried_stuffed_berry.summary: Dried Stuffed Berry is a food item made by the Dehydrator from Stuffed Berry. It doesn't spoil and is inedible until restored at the Rehydrator.

dried_surf_n_turf.name: Dried Surf'n'Turf
dried_surf_n_turf.description: A dehydrated Surf'n'Turf ration. It must be rehydrated in order to be considered Food
dried_surf_n_turf.summary: Dried Surf'n'Turf is a food item made by the Dehydrator from Surf'n'Turf. It doesn't spoil and is inedible until restored at the Rehydrator.

edamame.name: Edamame
edamame.description: Raw Nosh Beans sprinkled with Sodicane shavings.Simple and satisfying.

fish_fillet.name: Fish Fillet
fish_fillet.description: An uncooked fillet from a very dead aquatic fritter. Yum!
fish_fillet.summary: The Fish Fillet is dropped by dead Pacus or other aquatic critters. It provides 1000 kcal with food quality of .

fish_taco.name: Fish Taco
fish_taco.description: Deep-fried fish cradled in a crunchy fin.
fish_taco.summary: Fish Taco is a food item made with 1000 kcal Fish Fillet, 2,400 g Tallow, and 2 units of Sleet Wheat Grain or Megafrond Grain at the Deep Fryer. It has a Food Quality of +4 and provides 4,200 kcal.

fried_mushroom.name: Fried Mushroom
fried_mushroom.description: A fried dish made with a fruiting Dusk Cap.It has a thick, savory flavor with subtle earthy undertones.

frost_bun.name: Frost Bun
frost_bun.description: A simple bun baked from Sleet Wheat Grain.Each bite leaves a mild cooling sensation in one's mouth, even when the bun itself is warm.
frost_bun.summary: Frost Bun is a food item made at the Electric Grill from 3 Sleet Wheat Grain or Megafrond Grain. Frost Bun has a Food Quality of Standard (+2) and provides 1200 kcal.

frost_burger.name: Frost Burger
frost_burger.description: Meat and Lettuce on a chilled Frost Bun.It's the only burger ever to be served cold.
frost_burger.summary: Frost Burger is a food item made in the Gas Range with 1 kg of (1200 kcal) Frost Bun, (400 kcal) Lettuce, and (4000 kcal) Barbeque each. It has a Food Quality of Ambrosial (+6).

gristle_berry.name: Gristle Berry
gristle_berry.description: The grilled bud of a Bristle Berry.Heat unlocked an exquisite taste in the fruit, though the burnt spines leave something to be desired.
gristle_berry.summary: }}Gristle Berry is a food item made at the Electric Grill from 1600 kcal Bristle Berry (1 Bristle Blossom). It has a Food Quality of Poor(+1) and provides 2000 kcal.

grubfruit.name: Grubfruit
grubfruit.description: A plump, healthy fruit with a honey-like taste.
grubfruit.summary: Grubfruits are the fruit of the non-Spindly Grubfruit Plants. they have the lowest calorie density of any food in the game.

grubfruit_preserve.name: Grubfruit Preserve
grubfruit_preserve.description: A long lasting jam preserved in .The thick, goopy jam retains the shape of the jar when poured out, but the sweet taste can't be matched.
grubfruit_preserve.summary: Grubfruit Preserve is a food item made from 8 (2000 kcal) and 4kg . It has a Food Quality of and provides 2400 kcal. Grubfruit Preserves, together with , boast the second highest shelf life possible at 32 cycles, only outclassed by Berry Sludge (which has the same quality), but the Preserves have much higher Quality than Pickled Meal.

hexalent_fruit.name: Hexalent Fruit
hexalent_fruit.description: A seedless fruit with an unusual rubbery texture.It cannot be replanted.
hexalent_fruit.summary: The Hexalent Fruit can only be consumed directly, there are no recipes using it as an ingredient.

jawbo_fillet.name: Jawbo Fillet
jawbo_fillet.description: An uncooked filet from a very dead Jawbo. It has a silky texture.

lettuce.name: Lettuce
lettuce.description: Crunchy, slightly salty leaves from a Waterweed plant.
lettuce.summary: }}Lettuce is a food item grown from Waterweed in 12 kg amounts which is equivalent to 4800 kcal. It has a Food Quality of Terrible (0).

liceloaf.name: Liceloaf
liceloaf.description: Meal Lice compacted into a dense, immobile loaf.
liceloaf.summary: is a food produced in the Microbe Musher from Meal Lice and Water, providing 1700 kcal of food at quality 0 (Terrible). It can spread Food Poisoning if the Water used to create it was contaminated with germs.

meal_lice.name: Meal Lice
meal_lice.description: A flavorless grain that almost never wiggles on its own.
meal_lice.summary: Meal Lice is of the worst Food Quality. However, Mealwood plants are economic to grow, as they require only dirt (10kg/cycle) and no water. This makes Mealwood especially useful in dry starts, such as Forest Biome.

meat.name: Meat
meat.description: Uncooked meat from a very dead Critter. Yum!
meat.summary: Meat is recommended to be cooked into a Barbeque in an Electric Grill as it provides 400 more calories per kg and has better quality than Meat. Barbeque also serves as an ingredient in even better meals made in a Gas Range.

megafrond_grain.name: Megafrond Grain
megafrond_grain.description: An ancient grain that can be processed into Food.
megafrond_grain.summary: Megafrond Grain is an inedible cooking ingredient.

mimillet.name: Mimillet
mimillet.description: The Mimillet is the seed of a Mimika Bud, dropped when a Mimika dies.

mixed_berry_pie.name: Mixed Berry Pie
mixed_berry_pie.description: A pie primarily made from and .The mixture of berries creates a fragrant, colorful filling that packs a sweet punch.
mixed_berry_pie.summary: Mixed Berry Pie is a late-game food added in the Spaced Out! DLC, requiring Duplicants to combine Grubfruits, Bristle Berries (Pikeapple or Ovagro Fig can also be used) and Sleet Wheat or Megafrond Grain in a Gas Range to cook. Bristle Berries and Pikeapples must be cooked into Gristle Berries or Pikeapple Skewer on an Electric Grill first. Cooking in this way nets no additional calories for your dupes, but it does increase Food Quality to .

muckroot.name: Muckroot
muckroot.description: A seedless fruit with an upsettingly bland aftertaste.It cannot be replanted.
muckroot.summary: Muckroot is a non-renewable Food item. It can be gathered either by uprooting a Buried Muckroot, or occasionally when unearthing Buried Objects in the Temperate Biome.

mush_bar.name: Mush Bar
mush_bar.description: An edible, putrefied mudslop.Mush Bars are preferable to starvation, but only just barely.
mush_bar.summary: The Mush Bar is a food item made using the Microbe Musher. It provides 800 kcal/kg and has a Food Quality of Grisly (-1). It requires Dirt, Water, and Power to produce it, and a Duplicant doing the Cook errand.

mush_fry.name: Mush Fry
mush_fry.description: Deep fried, solidified mudslop.The inside is almost completely uncooked, despite the crunch on the outside.
mush_fry.summary: The Mush Fry is a food item made from 800 kcal of Mush Bar. It has a Food Quality of 0 and provides 1,050 kcal.

mushroom.name: Mushroom
mushroom.description: An edible, flavorless fungus that grew in the dark.
mushroom.summary: Mushroom is a produce harvested from Dusk Cap.

mushroom_quiche.name: Mushroom Quiche
mushroom_quiche.description: Omelette, Fried Mushroom and Lettuce piled onto a yummy crust.
mushroom_quiche.summary: Mushroom Quiche is a food item made with 2800 kcal Omelette, 400 kcal Lettuce and 2800 kcal Fried Mushroom at the Gas Range. It has a Food Quality of +5 and provides 6400 kcal.

mushroom_wrap.name: Mushroom Wrap
mushroom_wrap.description: Flavorful Mushrooms wrapped in Lettuce.It has an earthy flavor punctuated by a refreshing crunch.
mushroom_wrap.summary: Mushroom Wrap is a food item made with Fried Mushroom and Lettuce at the Gas Range. It provides 4,800 kcal with Food Quality of .

mussel_tongue.name: Mussel Tongue
mussel_tongue.description: Edible tongue of a Mussel Sprout.It's bitter and chewy, but better than starvation.

nigiri.name: Nigiri
nigiri.description: Tenderized Calamari and Liceloaf wrapped in Nori.Expert preparation highlights the meat's delicate sweetness and soft, chewy texture.

nori.name: Nori
nori.description: A bundle of slightly salty dried greenery from a Tower Kelp or Kelpole. It's most commonly used as an ingredient in higher-tier dishes.

nosh_bean.name: Nosh Bean
nosh_bean.description: An inedible bean that can be processed into delicious foods.
nosh_bean.summary: The Nosh Bean is both the seed and product of Nosh Sprout.

nosh_noms.name: Nosh Noms
nosh_noms.description: A snackable handful of crunchy beans.
nosh_noms.summary: Nosh Noms is a food item made with 1,000 g Tallow and 6 units Nosh Bean at the Deep Fryer. It has a Food Quality of +3 and provides 5,000 kcal.

nutrient_bar.name: Nutrient Bar
nutrient_bar.description: A nourishing nutrient paste, sandwiched between thin wafer layers.
nutrient_bar.summary: Nutrient Bars are food items. The Ration Box at the start of the game contains 20 kg (16000 kcal) of Nutrient Bars.

omelette.name: Omelette
omelette.description: Fluffed and folded egg innards.It turns out you do, in fact, have to break a few eggs to make it.
omelette.summary: The Omelette is a food item made from 1,600 kcals of Raw Egg, when cooked in the Electric Grill, or when a Raw Egg is heated to . It has a Food Quality of 2 and provides 2,800 kcals.

ovagro_fig.name: Ovagro Fig
ovagro_fig.description: It's fun to squeeze as many as possible in a single mouthful.
ovagro_fig.summary: Ovagro Fig is the fruit of the Ovagro Vines from the Ovagro Node.
ovagro_fig.source: Ovagro Vine from the Ovagro Node

pemmican.name: Pemmican
pemmican.description: Meat and Tallow pounded into a calorie-dense brick with anexceptionally long shelf life. Survival never tasted so good.
pemmican.summary: Pemmican is a food item made with 1,600 kcal Meat and 1,000 g Tallow at the Microbe Musher. It has a Food Quality of +2 and provides 2,600 kcal.

pepper_bread.name: Pepper Bread
pepper_bread.description: A loaf of bread, lightly spiced with Pincha Peppernut for a mild bite.There's a simple joy to be had in pulling it apart in one's fingers.
pepper_bread.summary: Pepper Bread is a food item made from 10 Sleet Wheat Grain and 1 Pincha Peppernut at the Gas Range. It has a Food Quality of Superb (+5) and provides 4,000 kcal.

pickled_meal.name: Pickled Meal
pickled_meal.description: Meal Lice preserved in vinegar.It's a rarely acquired taste.
pickled_meal.summary: Pickled Meal is a food item made from 3 Meal Lice (1800 kcal). It has a Food Quality of -1 (Grisly) and provides 1800 kcal. Pickled Meal (and Grubfruit Preserve) have the highest shelf life possible (besides the items with unlimited shelf life). Since it is cooked at an Electric Grill, any food poisoning germs present on the ingredients (meal lice) will not survive.

pikeapple.name: Pikeapple
pikeapple.description: An edible fruit encased in a thorny husk.
pikeapple.summary: Pikeapples are the edible fruits of Pikeapple Bushes. They can be eaten raw or cooked, and can be fed to some Critters.

pikeapple_skewer.name: Pikeapple Skewer
pikeapple_skewer.description: Grilling a Pikeapple softens its spikes, making it slightly less awkward to eat.It does not diminish the smell.
pikeapple_skewer.summary: Pikeapple Skewers are Food items created by cooking Pikeapples at an Electric Grill. They can be eaten by Duplicants, or fed to some Critters.

pincha_peppernut.name: Pincha Peppernut
pincha_peppernut.description: The flavorful nut of a Pincha Pepperplant. The bitter outer rind hides a rich, peppery core that is useful in cooking.
pincha_peppernut.summary: Pincha Peppernuts are grown and can be harvested from the Pincha Pepper Plant. Pincha Peppernuts are very useful in the creation of late game foods, such as Pepper Bread, Stuffed Berry, and Spicy Tofu.

plant_meat.name: Plant Meat
plant_meat.description: Planty plant meat from a plant. How nice!
plant_meat.summary: Plant Meat is planty plant meat produced by a Saturn Critter Trap.

plume_squash.name: Plume Squash
plume_squash.description: An edible tuber with an earthy, elegant flavor.
plume_squash.summary: Plume Squash are the edible fruits of the Plume Squash Plant.

raw_egg.name: Raw Egg
raw_egg.description: A raw egg that has been cracked open for use in Food preparation.It will never hatch.
raw_egg.summary: Raw Egg can be made from an Egg using an Egg Cracker. It is edible, but it is better to prepare it on Electric Grill or Gas Range. Raw Egg will turn into Omelette if exposed to a hot temperature for an extended time

raw_shellfish.name: Raw Shellfish
raw_shellfish.description: An uncooked chunk of very dead Sanishell. Yum!
raw_shellfish.summary: Raw Shellfish is dropped by dead Pokeshells (All Morphs) and Orehulls. It provides 1000 kcal with food quality of .

roast_grubfruit_nut.name: Roast Grubfruit Nut
roast_grubfruit_nut.description: Slow roasted .It has a smoky aroma & tastes of coziness.
roast_grubfruit_nut.summary: Roast Grubfruit Nut is a food item made from . It provides 1200 kcal with food quality of . Its shelf-life is comparable to and .

salty_sticks.name: Salty Sticks
salty_sticks.description: An extremely salty snack harvested from a Sodicane.Visiting a Water Cooler will conteract the Thirst caused by eating Salty Sticks.

shellfish_tempura.name: Shellfish Tempura
shellfish_tempura.summary: Shellfish Tempura is a food item made with 1000 kcal Raw Shellfish, 2,400 g Tallow, and 2 units Sleet Wheat Grain at the Deep Fryer. It has a Food Quality of +4 and provides 4,200 kcal.

sherberry.name: Sherberry
sherberry.description: A cold seedless fruit that triggers mild brain freeze.It cannot be replanted.
sherberry.summary: Sherberries are a nonrenewable, nonperishable Food item. They can be obtained by digging up Sherberry Plants, or they can sometimes be found when excavating Buried Objects in the Ice Cave Biome. Due to their convenient location and early availability, they are often the second food source in the game to be utilized (after Pemmican) when starting on the Ceres Asteroid.
sherberry.source: Sherberry Plant, Buried Object (in Ice Cave Biome)

sleet_wheat_grain.name: Sleet Wheat Grain
sleet_wheat_grain.description: Sleet Wheat produces Sleet Wheat Grain, a chilly grain that can be processed into Food.
sleet_wheat_grain.summary: Sleet Wheat Grain is produced by Sleet Wheat every 18 Cycles. Harvesting Sleet Wheat yields 18 Sleet Wheat Grains. Sleet Wheat is inedible when unprepared.

smoked_fish.name: Smoked Fish
smoked_fish.description: A buttery smoked fish fillet.It flakes nicely when pulled apart with a fork.
smoked_fish.summary: The Smoked Fish is a food item made from Fish Fillet or Jawbo Fillet in the Smoker. It provides 2,800 kcal with a food quality of .

snac_fruit.name: Snac Fruit
snac_fruit.description: A seedless fruit with an upsettingly bland aftertaste.It cannot be replanted.
snac_fruit.summary: is a non-renewable Food item. It can be gathered either by uprooting a Snactus, or occasionally when unearthing Buried Objects in the Garden Biome.

souffl_pancakes.name: Soufflé Pancakes
souffl_pancakes.description: Sweet discs made from Raw Egg and Sleet Wheat Grain.
souffl_pancakes.summary: Soufflé Pancakes are prepared at an Electric Grill with 1600 kcal worth of Raw Egg and 2 Sleet Wheat Grain. It provides 3600 kcal with food quality of Good (+3).

spicy_tofu.name: Spicy Tofu
spicy_tofu.description: Tofu marinated in a flavorful Pincha Peppernut sauce. It packs a delightful punch.
spicy_tofu.summary: The Spicy Tofu is a food item made with Tofu and Pincha Peppernut.

spindly_grubfruit.name: Spindly Grubfruit
spindly_grubfruit.description: A Grubfruit that failed to develop properly.It is nonetheless edible, and vaguely tasty,
spindly_grubfruit.summary: A Grubfruit that failed to develop properly.It is nonetheless edible, and vaguely tasty. It provides 800 kcal per fruit (one fruit is 1kg) and its Food Quality is . It can be cooked in the Electric Grill to make Roast Grubfruit Nut, increasing its calories count to 1200kcal.

squash_fries.name: Squash Fries
squash_fries.summary: Squash Fries is a food item made with 4,000 kcal Plume Squash and 1,000 g Tallow at the Deep Fryer. It has a Food Quality of +3 and provides 5,400 kcal.

stuffed_berry.name: Stuffed Berry
stuffed_berry.description: A baked Bristle Berry stuffed with delectable spices and vibrantly flavored.
stuffed_berry.summary: The Stuffed Berry is a food item made from 2 Pincha Peppernuts and 4,000 kcal of Gristle Berry at the Gas Range. It has a Food Quality of +4 and provides 4,400 kcal.

surf_n_turf.name: Surf'n'Turf
surf_n_turf.description: A bit of Meat from the land and Cooked Seafood from the sea.It's hearty and satisfying.
surf_n_turf.summary: The Surf'n'Turf is a food item made from 4,000 kcal of Barbeque and 1,600 kcal of Cooked Seafood. It provides 6,000 kcal with food quality of .

sushi_roll.name: Sushi Roll
sushi_roll.description: Raw Fish Fillet paired with Liceloaf and wrapped in Nori.The salty, crispy wrap balances perfectly with the juicy proteins inside.

swamp_chard_heart.name: Swamp Chard Heart
swamp_chard_heart.description: A seedless plant with a squishy, juicy center and an awful smell.It cannot be replanted.
swamp_chard_heart.summary: Swamp Chard Heart a non-renewable Food, just like Muckroot and Hexalent. It's an early-game source of kilo-calories before the player establishes some form of food production, like a farm.

swampy_delights.name: Swampy Delights
swampy_delights.description: Dried Gelatinous cubes from a Each cube has a wonderfully chewy texture and is lightly coated in a delicate powder
swampy_delights.summary: Swampy Delights is a food item made from using the Electric Grill. It provides 2240 kcal with food quality of .

sweatcorn.name: Sweatcorn
sweatcorn.description: The sugary vegetable of a Sweatcorn Stalk.It tastes a lot better deep-fried.
sweatcorn.summary: Sweatcorn is the vegetable of the Sweatcorn Stalk plant.

tender_brisket.name: Tender Brisket
tender_brisket.description: The Tender Brisket is a food item made from Tough Meat in the Smoker. It provides 5,000 kcal with a food quality of .

toasted_mimillet.name: Toasted Mimillet
toasted_mimillet.description: The Toasted Mimillet is a food item made from Mimillet at the Electric Grill. It provides 1,500 kcal with a food quality of .

tofu.name: Tofu
tofu.description: A bland curd made from Nosh Beans.It has an unusual but pleasant consistency.
tofu.summary: Tofu is a food item made from 6 Nosh Beans and 50kg of Water. It provides 3,600 kcal with food quality of .

tough_meat.name: Tough Meat
tough_meat.description: Uncooked meat from a very dead Critter. Yum!
tough_meat.summary: Tough Meat is uncooked meat from a dead Rhex or Lumb. It is inedible.

uni.name: Uni
uni.description: The edible flesh of a Pinpoki.A rare delicacy whose safe preparation involves destroying the valuable outer spikes.
uni.summary: It is currently the highest kcal-to-kg holder at 7,200 kcal/kg, outmatching Mushroom Quiche and Hexalent Fruit, while also being renewable.

veggie_poppers.name: Veggie Poppers
veggie_poppers.description: The Veggie Poppers is a food item made from Sweatcorn, Pikeapple, or Spindly Grubfruit in the Smoker. It provides 2,862.5 kcal with a food quality of .
